nodes.label: AI as collaborative enhancer of human work
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement doing work for you
nodes.grounding_span: I like it to be just that, something that assists or enhances my own work

nodes.label: AI as resource for refining and improving output
nodes.grounding_span: running it through AI to see if I prefer any of the suggestions offered

nodes.label: AI as tool for efficient information extraction
nodes.grounding_span: searching documents quickly and retaining key points

nodes.label: Human empathy and interpersonal understanding
nodes.label_negative: AI lacking human empathy and personalization
nodes.grounding_span: only a person can truly know human interaction, feelings, body language, tone and most importantly empathy

nodes.label: Skill of refining AI requests iteratively
nodes.label_negative: Frustration with AI due to poor prompting
nodes.grounding_span: I have developed a skill set in order to refine my requests detail by detail

nodes.label: Personalized and human-centered communication
nodes.grounding_span: the wording or personalization that a human who knows how each person prefers things worded or formatted

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity in work tasks
nodes.grounding_span: searching documents quickly and retaining key points

nodes.label: Human empathy and emotional connection
nodes.grounding_span: only a person can truly know human interaction, feelings, body language, tone and most importantly empathy

nodes.label: Positive embrace of AI collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: I am on board 100 percent. I am excited and looking forward to working hand in hand with AI

nodes.label: Negative view of colleagues using AI as replacement
nodes.grounding_span: they use it to do their work for them not as a resource. I find this can produce generic work

nodes.label: Satisfaction with iterative refinement process
nodes.grounding_span: This does not frustrate me at all. I enjoy working like that

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through detailed prompting
nodes.grounding_span: I have developed a skill set in order to refine my requests detail by detail

nodes.label: Collaborative integration of AI output with human judgment
nodes.grounding_span: creating what I need, then running it through AI to see if I prefer any of the suggestions offered
